  (fun i => if y.val = i ∧ rank m x.val = rank m y.val then rank m y.val + 1 else rank m i) i.val <

n: ℕ

m: UFModel n

x, y: Fin n

H: rank m x.val ≤ rank m y.val

hroot: (parent m y).val = y.val

i: Fin n

((fun i => if x.val = i.val then y else parent m i) i).val ≠ i.val →
  (fun i => if y.val = i ∧ rank m x.val = rank m y.val then rank m y.val + 1 else rank m i) i.val <
    (fun i => if y.val = i ∧ rank m x.val = rank m y.val then rank m y.val + 1 else rank m i)
      ((fun i => if x.val = i.val then y else parent m i) i).val

theorem

  n = Array.size arr →

        f (Array.get arr { val := i, isLt := h₁ }) = g { val := i, isLt := h₂ }) →
      Agrees arr f g

rfl 
λ.: ∀ (a : ℕ) (a_1 : a < Array.size #[]) (a_2 : a < 0),
  f (Array.get #[] { val := a, isLt := a_1 }) = g { val := a, isLt := a_2 }
λ.

theorem 
push: ∀ {α : Type u_1} {β : Sort u_2} {f : α → β} {arr : Array α} {n : ℕ} {m : Fin n → β},
  Agrees arr f m →
    ∀ (k : ℕ),
      k = n + 1 →
        ∀ (x : α) (m' : Fin k → β),
          (∀ (i : Fin k) (h : i.val < n), m' i = m { val := i.val, isLt := h }) →
            (∀ (h : n < k), f x = m' { val := n, isLt := h }) → Agrees (Array.push arr x) f m'

theorem 
set: ∀ {α : Type u_1} {β : Sort u_2} {f : α → β} {arr : Array α} {n : ℕ} {m : Fin n → β},
  Agrees arr f m →
    ∀ {i : Fin (Array.size arr)} {x : α} {m' : Fin n → β},
      (∀ (j : Fin n), j.val ≠ i.val → m' j = m j) →
        (∀ (h : i.val < n), f x = m' { val := i.val, isLt := h }) → Agrees (Array.set arr i x) f m'

empty: ∀ {α : Type u_1}, Models #[] UFModel.empty

theorem 
push: ∀ {α : Type u_1} {arr : Array (UFNode α)} {n : ℕ} {m : UFModel n},
  Models arr m →
    ∀ (k : ℕ),
      k = n + 1 →

theorem 
setParent: ∀ {α : Type u_1} {arr : Array (UFNode α)} {n : ℕ} {m : UFModel n},
  Models arr m →
    ∀ (i j : Fin n) (H : rank m i.val < rank m j.val) (hi : i.val < Array.size arr) (x : UFNode α),
      x.parent = j.val →
        x.rank = arr[i].rank → Models (Array.set arr { val := i.val, isLt := hi } x) (UFModel.setParent m i j H)

self: UnionFind α

x, y: Fin (size self)

yroot: (Array.get self.arr y).parent = y.val

ne: ¬x.val = y.val

hx: x.val < Array.size self.arr

nx:= self.arr[x]: UFNode α

h: ¬ny.rank < nx.rank

arr₁:= Array.set self.arr x { parent := y.val, value := nx.value, rank := nx.rank }: Array (UFNode α)

arr₂:= if nx.rank = ny.rank then
  Array.set arr₁ { val := y.val, isLt := (_ : y.val < Array.size arr₁) }
    { parent := ny.parent, value := ny.value, rank := ny.rank + 1 }
else arr₁: Array (UFNode α)
